name: Black Drum Creole
recipeIngredient: Salt and red pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the fish well, making scoring marks on both sides at one-inch intervals.
2. Season the fish with salt and pepper.
3. Squeeze lemon juice over the fish and place it in a heavy casserole dish.
4. Heat oil in a heavy black iron pot over medium heat.
5. Make a roux by adding flour to the oil and cooking until desired color is reached.
6. Add seasonings, sauteing until well combined.
7. Stir in tomato paste, tomatoes, and water, blending thoroughly.
8. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
9. Add remaining seasonings and adjust taste as needed.
10. Cook approximately 20 minutes.
11. Pour the resulting gravy over the fish.
12. Cook uncovered at 350°F (175°C) in an oven for about 1 hour, adding water if necessary to maintain volume.
Also suitable for: Sheepshead, Bull Croaker or other scaled fish.
